ast.name: log
ast.source: todoist text: not looking at file bc of excluded directories
ast.target: todoist text: not looking at file bc of excluded directories

ast.name: log
ast.source: Todoist Text: Updating keyword with todos. If this happened automatically and you did not intend for this to happen, you should either disable automatic replacement of your keyword with todos (via the settings), or exclude this file from auto replace (via the settings).
ast.target: Todoist Text: 正在使用待办事项更新关键字。如果这是自动发生的，而您并不希望如此，您应该通过设置禁用关键字自动替换为待办事项的功能，或者通过设置将此文件排除在自动替换之外。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Todoist text: not checking for replacement keyword because of previous server failure. Either use the manual keyword, or restart the app.
ast.target: Todoist text: 由于之前的服务器故障，未检查替换关键字。请使用手动关键字，或重启应用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, any time a keyword is seen in a non-excluded file, it will be automatically replaced with your Todos whenever the file is opened. When disabled, manually use the 'Replace keyword with todos' command to replace your keyword with Todos.
ast.target: 启用后，每当在非排除文件中看到关键字时，只要打开文件，它就会自动替换为您的待办事项。禁用后，请手动使用“将关键字替换为待办事项”命令来替换您的关键字。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, any Subtasks associated with Todos meeting filter criteria from your keyword will be shown, indented, under the parent Todo.
ast.target: 启用后，与符合您关键字过滤条件的待办事项关联的任何子任务，都将在父待办事项下方以缩进形式显示。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable automatic replacement of keyword with Todos
ast.target: 启用关键字自动替换为待办事项

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 添加另一个排除的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add another keyword and Todoist query
ast.target: 添加另一个关键字和 Todoist 查询

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 无法在以下位置找到任务 ID：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Todoist Text: You need to configure your Todoist API token in the Todoist Text plugin settings
ast.target: Todoist Text: 您需要在 Todoist Text 插件设置中配置您的 Todoist API 令牌

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Todoist Text: Error trying to update task status. See console log for more details.
ast.target: Todoist Text: 尝试更新任务状态时出错。请查看控制台日志了解更多详情。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将关键字替换为待办事项

ast.name: text
ast.target: 重要 - 请参阅使用说明
